top.text: Stay on top of the latest currency trends with the help of our comprehensive market overview.

main.content-1: Euro Currency Index depreciated against the basket of currencies on Monday.* Euro-Zone Construction Output demonstrated month-on-month growth but year-on-year decline. Construction activity is usually connected to consumer spending and accelerating economic development, which may not be the case for the euro area…
main.content-2: The USD has slightly appreciated against other currencies in the beginning of this week.* The dollar fell somewhat on Friday but reestablished its position on Monday.* Amid market tranquility the future behavior of the American currency can be affected by macroeconomic news and events…
main.content-3: The JPY currently trades slightly lower than it closed on Friday.* The exchange rate of the Japanese yen remains relatively unchanged even after the Bank of Japan has announced its benchmark interest rate to remain the same…
main.content-4: USD/JPY moved higher from 109.73 to 110.81. USD/JPY trended up for 3 consecutive days, and this could be explained as positioning of trades ahead of the Fed monetary policy decision later this week...
main.risk: *NOTE: Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future performance. Forecasts are not reliable indicator of future performance. This material is not an investment advice.
